summary: P0 order-pending reconciliation fix verified. All 139/139 backend pytest tests pass, including 12 new reconciliation tests in test_order_pending_reconcile.py. Scope of code change confirmed limited to backend/main.py (+_reconcile_order_pending_timeout helper and _step_order_pending delegation) and backend/execution_timeline.py (+2 new Event constants). Frontend testing skipped per request.
critical_code_review_comments: Code change scope respected — only main.py + execution_timeline.py touched (git diff --stat confirms 2 files, +182 lines). Test file added under backend/tests/. No changes to SMC/HTF/risk/sizer/telegram/broker/UI/DB.
Idempotency guard verified via new tests: `pending_entry is None or has_open_position` short-circuits reconciliation; broker.order_book/positions not called on subsequent invocations.
Existing _handle_fill guard (order_id match) provides second layer of duplicate-fill defence — good defense-in-depth.
seed_data_creation: None — tests use MagicMock broker and NiftyOptionsBot.__new__ pattern
context_for_next_testing_agent: 139 pytest tests passing. Reconciliation fix confirmed scoped to _step_order_pending + private helper + 2 timeline events. If future changes touch _handle_fill / _place_protective_legs / broker wrapper, re-run tests/test_order_pending_reconcile.py first.
verification_commands_run: git diff --stat HEAD → only backend/main.py (+179), backend/execution_timeline.py (+3)
